features: VERSATILE USAGE FOR YOUR NEEDS - This doormat will protect your floor/carpet where its high-walking-traffic. You can use it as, entrance mat, garage rug, welcome mat or on your patio. Our doormat is suitable for commercial and domestic use.
GENEROUS SIZED & ANTI-SLIP - These mats are available in 15 Sizes. It traps dirt and fits up to multiple shoes. The mat will always stay in place and won't slide around as many others do.

EASY TO KEEP CLEAN - Unlike other door mats, our doormat is easy and just takes a few minutes to wipe-off so it looks like new again. The mat is lightweight so anyone in your household can do it. Get yours now, you won't regret it!

TrendMakers Multi-Purpose Mats : With its flexible PVC backing that is slip resistant on hard floors like vinyl, tiles or wooden laminate, this is a safe and reliable entrance mat that is perfect for families of all sizes, preventing any trip or slip hazards in the home. Thanks to its high quality PVC, the rubber backing will not leave any stains or marks on your surfaces

TrendMakers Easy Clean Mats : The mat is designed so that it is simple to use and simple to clean. It’s easy to vacuum if desired, and machine washable at 30 degrees Celsius. Hang to dry after washing

description: Product description This is a new super hardwearing barrier/dust mat. It is suitable for any high traffic area of the home or work place. The PVC edge and backing means it will sit completely flat on the floor and will not turn up at the corners, or move on any hard surface i.e. tiles, lino, laminate or wooden flooring, its hard wearing polypropylene top does not shed its pile and can be power hosed for easy cleaning. This mat is available in Grey, Beige, Brown, Red, and Blue. Safety Warning Always use on a flat, stable surface. Avoid placing on uneven or wet surfaces to prevent slipping. Allow the mat to dry completely after washing to prevent mold growth. Keep away from open flames and heat sources to prevent fire hazards.
